name: loan-amount-broker-correction-wins
rationale: Broker initial intake states loan_amount $260,000. loan_application doc shows $260,000 (no discrepancy at intake). Broker subsequently corrects to $295,000 via reply. F1.LA canonical-map resolves to broker_correction tier value ($295k); loan_app source is shadowed by broker_correction. Tests highest-tier source winning when broker explicitly corrects.
notes: Two-event sequence. Distinct from A08 (>30% discrepancy triggering suppression): A01 correction is small enough not to trigger discrepancyHold but broker_correction still authoritative.
